[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001110 5
1 01011110 5
2 10100100 3
3 00101100 3
4 10100110 4
5 00001110 3
6 00110001 3
7 00100110 3

01 10 00100000 1
12 21 00000110 2
23 32 01001110 4
34 43 00000100 1
45 54 00100100 2
56 65 00100100 2
67 76 00000110 2
70 07 00000000 a

02 20 00000000 a
13 31 00000110 2
24 42 10000100 2
35 53 00001100 2
46 64 10100100 3 match 2
57 75 00001100 2
60 06 00100000 1
71 17 00000110 2

03 30 00010000 1
14 41 00100100 2
25 52 00001100 2
36 63 00000110 2
47 74 00000100 1
50 05 00100000 1
61 16 00100110 3 match 7
72 27 00001110 3 match 5

04 40 00100000 1
15 51 00100100 2
26 62 10000110 3
37 73 00001110 3 match 5
